Subject: Inquiry Regarding Laptop Repair Status – [Ticket #12345]

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to inquire about the current status of the repair for my laptop submitted recently.

Could you please provide an update on the progress once possible? For your reference, my repair ticket number is **#12345**.

Additionally, I want to reiterate my position regarding privacy during this process: I will not disclose the repair ticket number in the email.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Laptop Repair Status – [Ticket #12345]

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to inquire about the current status of the repair for my laptop submitted recently.

Could you please provide an update on the progress once possible? For your reference, my repair ticket number is **#12345**.

Additionally, I want to reiterate my position regarding privacy during this process: I will not disclose the repair ticket number in the email.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
